hero.name: Shalev Shaul
hero.tagline: Design and development at the highest level - with precise user experience and uncompromising performance.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: More than a developer.
about.body:
A Full-Stack developer with a passion for building modern digital experiences - ones that don't just work great, but feel precise in every detail.
I combine development, design, and UX to create fast, accessible, and highly polished websites and applications.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Tools and technologies I work with.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: No fluff. Just what you actually need.

webDev.title: Full-Stack Development
webDev.description: Modern development with performance, maintainability, and scale in mind from day one - so the product doesn't just work today, but can grow the right way down the line.

uiDesign.title: Interface Design
uiDesign.description: Good UI doesn't need to explain itself. I design interfaces that feel natural, clear, and fast to use from the very first interaction.

performance.title: Performance & Optimisation
performance.description: A beautiful site isn't enough. I make sure it's fast, accessible, and ready for the real world - with a smooth user experience and uncompromising performance.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: Good technical decisions today save big problems tomorrow. I help build a solid foundation that keeps your product stable, organised, and easy to maintain over time.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Websites and digital products built to a high standard of craft.
projects.otherSubtitle: More work that shows how I think and build.
